login_enter_code: Enter the code sent to your email:
login_code_instruction: Enter the code from your email, or request a new one.
login_unregistered_email: This email address has not been registered. Please contact an administrator.
login_check_email: Check your email for the 6-digit code ({mode} database).
login_invalid_code: Invalid or expired code. Make sure you're using the latest code sent to your email for the {mode} database.
login_err_email_not_confirmed: This auth user exists, but their email is not confirmed in Supabase Auth yet.
login_err_otp_disabled: Email OTP is disabled in Supabase Authentication settings.
login_err_signup_disabled: Closed-group sign-in is enabled, and Supabase is refusing to create or use a new auth signup for this email.
login_err_rate_limit_email: Too many login emails have been sent to this address. Please wait a little and try again.
login_err_rate_limit_requests: Too many login attempts have been made from this client. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
login_err_email_not_authorized: Supabase's current email provider is not allowed to send to this address. Check your SMTP/provider configuration.
login_err_backend: Supabase Auth hit a backend error. If this user was added manually to auth.users, recreate them with the admin provisioning script so their email identity and confirmation state are created correctly.
login_err_no_identity: Supabase could not find a usable email auth identity for this address. The user may exist in auth.users but still be missing a valid email identity or confirmed email.
login_err_generic: Unable to send the sign-in code right now.

fatal_fetch_members: The app could not fetch members from Supabase.
